title: fixtures + tests: all Chat methods
description:
What: Write fixture files (by hand from spec) and wiremock tests for all 5 new Chat methods.

Fixture files to create (in crates/jmap-chat/tests/fixtures/methods/):
1. chat_set_create_direct_response.json — SetResponse with created map: {"client-direct-001": {"id": "01HV5Z6QKWJ7N3P8R2X4YTMDAA", "kind": "direct", ...}}
2. chat_set_create_group_response.json — SetResponse with created map: {"client-group-001": {"id": "01HV5Z6QKWJ7N3P8R2X4YTMDBB", "kind": "group", ...}}
3. chat_set_update_response.json — SetResponse with updated map: {"01HV5Z6QKWJ7N3P8R2X4YTMDAA": null}
4. chat_typing_response.json — {methodResponses: [["Chat/typing", {"accountId": "account1"}, "r1"]], sessionState: "sess-abc"}
5. chat_query_changes_response.json — QueryChangesResponse: {accountId, oldQueryState, newQueryState, removed: [], added: [{id: "...", index: 0}]}

All fixtures wrapped in standard JMAP envelope: {"methodResponses": [[method, args, "r1"]], "sessionState": "sess-abc"}

Tests to add to crates/jmap-chat/tests/methods_test.rs (append after test 35):
- test 36: chat_create_direct_returns_typed_response — body_json matcher verifying {create: {"client-direct-001": {kind:"direct", contactId:"..."}}}, asserts created key
- test 37: chat_create_group_returns_typed_response — body_json matcher verifying {create: {"client-group-001": {kind:"group", name:"...", memberIds:[...]}}}, asserts created key; optional fields absent when None
- test 38: chat_set_update_returns_typed_response — body_json matcher verifying {update: {chatId: {muted: true}}}, asserts updated map
- test 39: chat_typing_sends_correct_args — body_json matcher verifying {accountId, chatId, typing: true}, asserts account_id in response
- test 40: chat_typing_rejects_empty_chat_id — guard test (no mock server), expects ClientError::InvalidArgument
- test 41: chat_query_changes_returns_typed_response — body_json matcher verifying {sinceQueryState, no maxChanges key}, asserts old/new query state, removed, added

Oracle for fixture values: spec wire shapes + hand-constructed values (IDs are valid ULID-format strings). No code under test used as oracle.

Update crates/jmap-chat/tests/fixtures/README.md methods/ table with all 5 new fixtures.

Defensive programming rules:
- body_json matchers verify absence of optional fields when not provided
- Guard test uses dummy URL "http://127.0.0.1:1", no MockServer
- All expected values derived from fixture file content, not from implementation

Acceptance: cargo test passes with tests 36-41 all green; all 5 fixture files exist; clippy and fmt clean
acceptance_criteria: cargo test passes including tests 36-41; 5 new fixture files exist in fixtures/methods/; README updated; clippy and fmt clean
close_reason: 5 fixture files created, tests 36-41 passing, README updated
